      "n": 32,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Schi irr ta Baufliha
preefsch ta/ kam Spittati irr/ ka
Rohka ne paspehj / zik winna
Schfihstifchanas pehz waijaga
irr.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 33,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un tas KUNGSrunnaja
us Mohfu un us Aaronu / un
fazzija:
"
    },
    {
      "n": 34,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Rad juhs nahfseet eefsch
Kanāāna Semmes / ko es jums
par Ihpaschn dohfschu / un es to
Spittatu-Wainu fahdā Num-
mā juhsā ihpaschas Semmes
peefuhtifchnu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 35,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad buhs tam / kam tas
Rams peederr / nahkt / un tam
Preesteram Stamm doht/ un faz-
zift: man fhkeet fahdu Wainu
mannā Namnā effam.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 36,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un tam Preesteram buhs
pawehleht / ka teem to Namnu
buhs iſkrawaht/ pirns tas Pree-
steris nahk to Wainu apraudſiht/
ka ne wiſſi / kas Namnā irr/ ne-
fchihsti tohp / un pehz to birhs
tam Preesteram nahkt / un to
Namnu apraudſiht.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 37,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Rad wiꞥſch nu to Wainu
aplubkojs/ un reds/ ka tai Wainai
pee ta Namna Seenahm irr pa-
saltas jed pafarkanas Lejixas/ un
tabs dsitkati israngahs ne ka ta
Seena.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 38,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad buhs tam Preesteram
no ta Namna tseet pee ta pascha
Ramna Durwin / un to Nam-
nu feptix Deenas afſtlehgt.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 39,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Pehz to buhs tam Pree-
steram
"
